description_long: This handgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by metallic gold panels and circular details. The main housing is boxy with several geometric cutouts and reinforced sections, giving it a futuristic, industrial appearance. Prominent gold mesh textures and metallic plates are visible on the grip, slide, and side panels, suggesting both style and enhanced grip. The barrel area is compact and integrated into the main body, with no visible external threading or compensators. Multiple screws and bolts are present, indicating a modular construction, while the grip is ergonomically angled and textured for secure handling. The overall finish is a mix of matte and semi-gloss, with some reflective surfaces on the gold accents.
description: A futuristic, angular black handgun with gold metallic accents, mesh textures, and a robust, industrial design. Features include a boxy body, ergonomic grip, and prominent screws and panels.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the gold mesh panel on the grip, a circular gold detail near the trigger area, and a large gold-accented circular plate on the main body.
description_view_1: The front view shows the compact barrel opening, flanked by angular black panels and gold accents on the top and bottom, with a recessed central section.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the gold mesh grip, circular gold detail, and the large gold-accented plate, with additional gold panels visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the grip with a textured pattern, two gold panels on the top, and the squared-off rear of the main body.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and ergonomically contoured, featuring a prominent gold mesh texture on its side panels for enhanced traction. The surface appears to be a combination of matte black polymer and metallic gold inserts, with visible screw heads reinforcing the structure. The grip is slightly flared at the base for stability and may include subtle finger grooves for comfort, though these are not deeply pronounced. No visible logos or embellishments are present, but the gold mesh pattern provides a distinctive, high-tech aesthetic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and angular, with a geometric, almost squared-off profile that integrates seamlessly into the main body. It appears reinforced with visible bolts and has a solid, protective design, lacking undercuts or aggressive curves. The surface is matte black, matching the rest of the frame, and there are no visible texturing or accessory rails on the guard itself.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is compact and integrated within the main housing, with no visible external threading, porting, or compensators. Its profile is flush with the front of the handgun, and the finish is consistent with the matte black and gold color scheme. No external markings or fluting are visible on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only decorative elements are the gold mesh textures and metallic panels, which serve as both functional and aesthetic features.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly flared and beveled, with a gold accent at the bottom. It is flat with a subtle extension for improved grip during magazine changes, and features a textured pattern for added traction. No finger rests, logos, or additional embellishments are visible.
